app.title: EsperantAI
app.subtitle: Universal AI gesture controller for streamers

triggers.universal_desc: same meaning in any culture (Ekman 1972 — basic emotions, head rotation, gaze)
triggers.cultural_desc: meaning may vary by country/culture (hand gestures)
triggers.connect_first_hint: Real scenes will appear in dropdowns automatically once connected.

advanced.use_preview: Use Preview + Transition in Studio Mode
advanced.studio_mode_hint: If unchecked, scene switches directly to Program. If checked, sets Preview first then triggers the OBS configured transition.
advanced.save_password: Remember OBS password (careful on shared computers!)
advanced.persistence_hint: All settings are automatically saved to localStorage.
advanced.kbd_r: Reload scene list from streaming app
advanced.calibration_desc: Personalize your gesture thresholds for your camera angle and movement range.

errors.camera_denied: Camera permission is off. Open your browser permissions and allow the camera so EsperantAI can track your gestures.
errors.camera_error: The camera could not start: {message}. Try another camera or close apps already using it.
errors.obs_unreachable: EsperantAI could not reach OBS. Open OBS, enable WebSocket Server, then try Connect again.
errors.obs_unreachable_short: Streaming app not connected — check WebSocket/API settings
errors.obs_wrong_password: The OBS WebSocket password does not match. Copy it from OBS → Tools → WebSocket Server Settings.
errors.file_protocol_warning: EsperantAI is running from file://. Browser cameras may be blocked. Launch it with the Windows launcher, Python server, or npx serve.
errors.human_load_error: The gesture AI did not load. Refresh the app; if it continues, check that the local Human.js files were copied correctly.
errors.import_error: That config file could not be imported: {message}. Export a fresh config and compare the format.
errors.reset_confirm: Delete all EsperantAI settings on this browser and return to defaults?
errors.missing_client_id: Paste the platform Client ID first. EsperantAI needs it before opening the login window.
errors.oauth_popup_blocked: Your browser blocked the login popup. Allow popups for this page and try again.
errors.oauth_state_invalid: Login verification failed. Close the popup and connect again to start a fresh secure login.
errors.platform_auth_failed: The platform connected your account, but EsperantAI could not start listening for events yet.
errors.streamelements_jwt_missing: Paste your StreamElements JWT first. You can find it in StreamElements account/channel settings.
errors.action_test_failed: The test ran, but the action did not complete. Check the selected scene/source and your streaming app connection.
errors.action_missing_params: This action is missing required settings. Fill the highlighted fields before saving.
errors.unknown_action_type: EsperantAI does not recognize this action type yet. Remove it or update the app.

hints.scene_mapping_hint: Select the OBS scene that activates with each gesture. Connect to OBS first so real scenes appear.
hints.head_priority_hint: Head rotation has highest priority. If your head moves, gaze and distance are ignored.
hints.gaze_hint: Only activates when your head is centered. If head also moves, head wins.
hints.distance_hint: Measures how close your face is. Only triggers when head is centered.
hints.emotion_hint: Emotion must be stable with high confidence. 2-second cooldown between emotion changes.
hints.blink_hint: Double blink = close both eyes quickly twice (within 700ms). 1-second cooldown.
hints.hand_hint: Hand gestures detection. Detected gestures: thumbs up, peace, rock, OK, fist, open palm, point, gassho.
hints.platform_hint: Connect to streaming platforms to trigger actions on events: donations, subs, raids, channel points.

diagnostic.silent_mode_on: Silent mode active. Logging only events and errors.
diagnostic.verbose_mode_on: Verbose mode active: {frames} frames without face.

license.required_desc: EsperantAI requires a valid license to operate. If you already purchased, paste your license key below. Otherwise, acquire one at esperantai.com
license.guided_subtitle: Your license unlocks the gesture controller for your stream.
license.step_buy_desc: Get one unique license from the official website.
license.step_paste_desc: Copy your license key from the purchase email.
license.step_stream_desc: Connect OBS and map gestures to scenes/actions.
license.required_desc_guided: If you already bought EsperantAI, paste your license key. If not, open the purchase page; this window will stay here so you can return and activate without losing your place.
license.key_hint: Tip: paste the full key; EsperantAI normalizes spaces and lowercase automatically.
license.error_empty: Paste your license key to activate EsperantAI.
license.error_expired: This license expired. Check your purchase email or contact support.
license.error_activation_limit: This license reached its device limit. Deactivate an old device or contact support.
license.error_network: We could not validate the license because of the connection. Check internet and try again.
license.error_invalid: The license key does not match. Check hyphens, spaces, or copy the full key from your email.
license.error_generic: We could not activate this license. Check the key or try again in a few minutes.

actions.modal_desc: Build the exact reaction this gesture should trigger while you stream.
actions.quick_scene_hint: If you add custom actions, EsperantAI will preserve this scene as the first action automatically.
actions.empty_state: No custom actions yet. The quick scene dropdown still works until you add custom actions.
actions.no_params_needed: This action does not need extra settings.

profiles.label: Profile:
profiles.switch_confirm: Switch profile? Current settings will be saved first.

calibration.subtitle: We will personalize gesture sensitivity for your face and movement range.
calibration.intro_item_1: Hold a neutral center pose for two seconds.
calibration.intro_item_2: Turn left/right and look up/down so we learn your comfortable range.
calibration.intro_item_3: Show one hand gesture to verify hand tracking.
calibration.why_it_matters_desc: EsperantAI will use 60% of your personal range as a safe dead zone. That reduces false triggers while keeping your gestures responsive.
calibration.baseline_desc: Look straight at the camera, relax your shoulders and keep your head centered.
calibration.left_right_desc: Turn gently to the left and right a few times. Use your natural streaming posture.
calibration.pitch_tilt_desc: Look up, look down and tilt your head naturally to both sides.
calibration.hand_desc: Raise one hand and show a thumbs-up, open palm or peace sign.
calibration.outcome_desc: These values create a personalized dead zone. Small natural movements stay centered, and intentional gestures cross the threshold sooner.

combo.hint: Combine a platform event with a physical gesture to confirm celebrations. Useful to avoid accidental triggers during streams.
combo.empty: No combos yet. Click + Add combo to create one.
combo.locked_desc: Combo triggers let you require a physical gesture to confirm platform events before the action fires — perfect to avoid accidental celebrations during streams.
